summary: Well-structured test suite with strong coverage of core requirements (secret classification, report generation, both markdown and JSON output formats, exit codes). Workflow integration tests via act verify CI/CD pipeline behavior. Good boundary condition testing (daysUntilExpiry = 0, = WarningDays, etc.) and error scenarios (missing fields, invalid dates, missing files). Main weaknesses: (1) Brittle exact-string regex matching in act tests will fail on minor formatting changes; (2) Fixture files (fixtures/*.json) referenced but not shown—tests depend on their existence; (3) No edge case coverage for special characters in names, very large secret lists, timezone handling, or concurrent execution; (4) Workflow file structure not shown, creating uncertainty about whether workflow actually exists/passes actionlint; (5) CLI subprocess execution loses some test context. Unit tests are excellent (clear Describe/Context/It structure, deterministic dates, proper cleanup). Would catch most regressions in core logic and happy-path scenarios, but integration test fragility and unverified external file dependencies are moderate risks.
